name: Too Many Parameters (Python)
description: Functions with too many parameters are hard to call correctly and signal a missing abstraction.
rationale: Long parameter lists are hard to remember and easy to misorder. In Python, consider using dataclasses, typed dicts, or keyword-only arguments to group related parameters and make the function signature self-documenting.
noncompliant_code:
def create_user(name, email, phone, address, city, zip_code, role):
    ...
